lines.text: This looks like a recording of an ancient Carnevale celebration. Since there's no Acolyte in sight… could it be from before the founding of the Order of the Deep? This is a marvelous discovery, {Male=Mr.;Female=Ms.} {PlayerName}!
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: Yes, that's right! The Sentinel is truly a great and wondrous being!
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: No, no! The Sentinel blessed us with fertile soil. The Sentinel gave us a home.
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: How dare they claim the Sentinel's blessings as their own!
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: S-such utter disgrace!
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: How could you say that, Mr. Medulius?!
Why did you turn so cold the moment your memories came back? You risked your life to save me, Mr. Medulius! You weren't like this before!
Mr. Medulius! When did you get here?
Hello. I am an Acolyte of the Order, Lenore. Any harsh work or dirty job you have, do feel free to send them my way!
All right!
You must be Mr. Bardolino? I recognize you! I used to love watching your performances when I was a child!
No, no, I didn't mean it that way... I'm sorry!
Andreas? The Andreas Brizio?
I'm Lenore. Don't you remember me?
If only I could've done more for you...
If only I'd noticed the Order's plans sooner. If only I... No, no matter how early, I couldn't have done anything... I'm sorry.
Huh?
But I don't even know Mr. Brant.
But I was a member of the Order. If it weren't for the Order...
No, {PlayerName} and I brought it back!
It's truly a beautiful song!
Hello everyone, my name is Lenore, from the Minor Forbidden Archive of the Order of the Deep. Oh, sorry, now I belong to the Fabricatorium of the Deep… Wait, that's not right either...
Hello everyone. My name is Lenore, and I'm an Acolyte of the Order of the Deep!
I've traveled far in recent days and seen things I couldn't have imagined.
While much of it was discouraging, I found treasured friends along this journey. And a gift from our ancestors—"The Nimbus Chorales."
I began my journey inspired by this song. And now, at its end, I'd like to share it with you!
I used to fear my role as an Acolyte. I worried that the doctrines of Salvation, Unity, and Ascension could be twisted again by the Threnodian to summon the Dark Tide.
But I'm no longer afraid. I've come to realize these teachings were always the heartbeat of Rinascita!
We once prayed for redemption to fall from the sky, hoping for a hand to lift us from suffering. Until Divinity showed us the path to true Salvation through Their departure.
We once feared the dangers beyond the sea mists, and turned on our fellow Rinascitans with suspicion and pride. Until we reached out and rediscovered what true Unity looks like.
Why did we ever forget? From the moment our ancestors braved the storms and stepped ashore, Rinascitan civilization already had its Ascension!
Perhaps one day, perhaps tomorrow, Rinascitans will no longer need the Order.
But I believe the ideals of Salvation, Unity, and Ascension will endure, like "The Nimbus Chorales."
They will resonate forever in every Rinascitan's heart!
